title: Clear Plastic Resealable Grip Seal Bags, Pack of 50 - Durable, Assorted Sizes, Perfect for Keeping Contents Safe & Secure
features: VARIETY OF SIZES: Receive a generous quantity of 50 clear resealable grip seal bags, each pack contains an assortment of sizes (5cm x 9cm, 8cm x 13.5cm, & 13cm x 19.5cm), making them perfect for a wide range of items from jewelry to snacks and beyond.
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Crafted from high-quality plastic, these bags are designed to withstand regular use, keeping your items protected time and time again.
SECURE RESEALABLE GRIP: The easy-to-use grip seal closure keeps contents safe and secure, providing peace of mind that your items are protected from dust, moisture, and accidental spills.
MULTIPURPOSE USE: Ideal for organizing small items, storing food, protecting important keepsakes, or even packing items for travel, these bags are versatile for both home and business use.
CLEAR VISIBILITY: The transparent plastic ensures the contents are always visible, making identification easy without the need to open the bag. Ideal for organization, travel, and storage needs.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality pack of resealable bags is designed in clear polythene resealable grip seal bags in assorted sizes. Safety Warning No warning applicable
